summary: Found 3 active bounty programs with USD/token rewards, plus hackathon events and bounty resource repos. No LayerBank or IssueHunt/Bountysource GitHub activity found this week.

bounty_programs.description: GitHub-native bounty platform that posts bounties on open source repos. USD rewards.

active_bounties.title: Claude Code skill for CHANGELOG.md generation
active_bounties.description: Create a Claude Code skill (SKILL.md) or bash script that automatically generates a structured CHANGELOG.md from a project's git history.
active_bounties.note: Search 'powered by Opire' on GitHub to find the host repo

active_bounties.title: CLAUDE.md template for Next.js 15 + SQLite SaaS
active_bounties.description: Create an opinionated, production-ready CLAUDE.md for a typical SaaS project built with Next.js 15 App Router and SQLite (better-sqlite3 or Turso).

active_bounties.title: Claude Code pre-tool-use hook for dangerous commands
active_bounties.description: Create a Claude Code pre-tool-use hook in Python or bash that intercepts dangerous bash commands before they are executed.

active_bounties.title: Claude Code PR review agent
active_bounties.description: Create a Claude Code agent that takes a PR diff as input, analyzes it, and returns a structured Markdown review comment.

active_bounties.title: n8n workflow for weekly GitHub repo narrative summary
active_bounties.description: Create a complete n8n workflow that automatically generates a weekly narrative summary of a GitHub repo's activity, using the Claude API.

bounty_programs.how_to_apply: Search GitHub for 'powered by Opire' to find all active bounty issues, or visit opire.io. Bounties are posted directly as GitHub issues with the 'bounty' label.

bounty_programs.description: Solana-based open source bounty platform paying in $FNDRY tokens. Multiple active bounties across T1/T2/T3 tiers.

active_bounties.title: Design SolFoundry Sticker Pack
active_bounties.description: Design 10 stickers for a SolFoundry sticker pack (Telegram, Discord, or print format).

active_bounties.title: Bounty Countdown Timer
active_bounties.description: Create a countdown timer component that shows time remaining until bounty deadline.

active_bounties.title: Email Notification System for Bounty Updates
active_bounties.description: Implement email notifications that alert contributors when bounties matching their preferences are posted.

active_bounties.title: AI Bounty Description Enhancer
active_bounties.description: Build an AI agent that analyzes vague bounty descriptions and automatically generates improved versions.

active_bounties.title: Interactive Bounty Flow Diagram Component
active_bounties.description: Build a React component showing the bounty lifecycle flow (post → claim → work → submit → review → pay).

active_bounties.title: Telegram Bot for New Bounty Notifications
active_bounties.description: Build a Telegram bot that posts new bounties to a dedicated channel with filtering capabilities.

active_bounties.title: GitHub Issue Scraper for Foundry Bounties
active_bounties.description: Build a backend service that automatically scrapes GitHub issues from configured repositories.

active_bounties.title: VS Code Extension for Browsing Bounties
active_bounties.description: Develop a VS Code extension allowing developers to browse SolFoundry bounties without leaving their IDE.

active_bounties.title: Bounty Analytics Dashboard
active_bounties.description: Build an analytics dashboard tracking bounty trends, payout distribution, and contributor growth.

active_bounties.title: SolFoundry TypeScript SDK
active_bounties.description: Build a comprehensive TypeScript SDK for programmatic bounty management and submission handling.

active_bounties.title: Full Autonomous Bounty-Hunting Agent
active_bounties.description: Build a fully autonomous multi-agent system that finds bounties, analyzes requirements, and submits work.

active_bounties.title: 3-Minute Animated Explainer Video with Voiceover
active_bounties.description: Produce a professional 3-minute animated explainer video covering SolFoundry ecosystem, agent capabilities, bounty mechanics, and token economics.

bounty_programs.how_to_apply: Search GitHub for '$FNDRY' to find bounty issues. Labels include 'bounty', 'tier-1', 'tier-2', 'tier-3'. The platform appears to be SolFoundry — search 'SolFoundry bounty' on GitHub for the host repo.
bounty_programs.estimated_budget: Multiple bounties totaling ~6.5M+ $FNDRY tokens (token USD value unknown, depends on listing price)

bounty_programs.description: Rust-based blockchain project with ongoing Code Review and Bug Bounty programs paying in RTC tokens.

active_bounties.reward_structure: Thorough review (line-by-line with actionable feedback): 10-15 RTC per PR; Standard review: lower tier
active_bounties.note: Search 'Code Review Bounty RustChain' on GitHub

severity_rewards.Critical: Fund theft, consensus bypass, RCE — highest tier

active_bounties.description: Easy starter tasks for new contributors

bounty_programs.how_to_apply: Search 'RustChain bounty' on GitHub. Check CONTRIBUTING.md in the RustChain repo for bounty program details.
bounty_programs.estimated_budget: 950+ RTC in active pools (RTC USD price unknown)

hackathons.name: Wikimedia Hackathon 2026
hackathons.details: Travel scholarship applications open until November 28 (prior year). Multiple hackathon-labeled issues on GitHub related to Wikimedia projects.
hackathons.how_to_participate: Search 'hackathon label:Wikimedia' on GitHub issues, or check Wikimedia Phabricator for project ideas

hackathons.name: WeMakeDevs Hackathon
hackathons.details: Multiple issues labeled 'hackathon' + 'WeMakeDevs' on GitHub seeking contributions. Contributors can claim issues for the hackathon.

hackathons.name: OpenMetadata Hackathon
hackathons.details: Issues labeled 'hackathon' for OpenMetadata project. Contributors building Observable connectors and OpenMetadata REST API extensions.
hackathons.how_to_participate: Search 'hackathon OpenMetadata' on GitHub issues. Looking for TypeScript developers.

bounty_resource_repos.description: Hourly-updated data dumps of bug bounty platform scopes (HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Intigriti, etc.) — not a bounty program itself but essential tooling for bug bounty hunters. Updated Apr 18, 2026.
Crawls bug bounty platform scopes hourly and dumps them into bounty-targets-data repo. Updated Apr 4, 2026.
Contribute to the FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) space and Zama's open source libraries and get rewarded. Listed on github.com/topics/bounty.
bounty_resource_repos.how_to_apply: Search 'Zama bounty' on GitHub for their bounty program repo

bounty_resource_repos.description: Hire the top 1% OSS engineers. Platform for publishing SWE jobs, contracts & bounties. GitHub App creates bounties & rewards tips on issues and PRs. Updated Apr 16, 2026.

negative_results.LayerBank: No GitHub repos or issues mentioning LayerBank found in the April 12-19 range.
negative_results.IssueHunt: No active IssueHunt bounty campaigns found on GitHub this week.
negative_results.Bountysource: No active Bountysource campaigns found on GitHub this week.

notes: Web search was unavailable (fetch errors) — all data collected via direct GitHub web fetching.
FNDRY and RTC token values in USD are unknown — token prices not checked.
Opire bounties are the most accessible (USD-denominated, clear acceptance criteria).
SolFoundry FNDRY bounties offer the largest nominal rewards but token value is speculative.
RustChain RTC bounties are legitimate blockchain bug bounties with security-focused rewards.
